human_actions_pending.context: Plan 04 is autonomous:false — after Waves 1-3 of Plan 04 execute, a checkpoint:human-verify gate requires the user to play the game and approve all 3 enemy variant behaviors (Moto, Resistente, Coraza) before Wave 4 completion is recorded.

decisions.decision: Coraza dual-condition dash check: body._is_dashing OR body._dash_timer > 0.0
decisions.rationale: Race condition: dash state may reset before stomp signal fires. Dual-check prevents unkillable enemy bug.

decisions.decision: @export var fase_width: int = 6400 in all 6 fase scripts
decisions.rationale: Future maintainability: allows individual fases to override width without script changes.

decisions.decision: motion_mirroring=Vector2(6400, 0) belongs on ParallaxLayer nodes, not ParallaxBackground
decisions.rationale: Godot 4 property location — review finding clarified which node owns the property.
